entries.title: Meta’s AI Image Model Puts Instagram to Work
entries.summary: Meta launched Muse Image, the first artificial intelligence image model from Meta Superintelligence Labs. entries.title: Prime Intellect Raises $130 Million to Help Companies Train AI Agents
entries.summary: Prime Intellect raised $130 million in a Series A funding round to scale its tech stack and target new problems with its “open superintelligence stack.” The company trains open frontier models and provides customers with the compute, large-scale reinforcement learning (RL), environments, sandboxes, evaluations and deployment they need for training, deploying and continuously improving their [&#823

entries.title: SMBs Swap Pricey SaaS Contracts for AI-Built Apps
entries.summary: For two decades, buying enterprise software meant accepting a vendor’s feature set, paying per seat and hiring specialists to manage the platform. For small businesses, that model often meant paying for capabilities they never used. AI coding tools are changing that calculation. Five startups and small companies with staff ranging from 20 to 70 people […] The post SMBs Swap Pricey SaaS Contr

entries.title: Illinois Governor Signs AI Safety Law Requiring Yearly LLM Audits
entries.summary: Illinois just told the biggest names in artificial intelligence (AI) that the rules are changing. On Monday (July 6), Gov. JB Pritzker signed a law that forces the largest AI companies to prove their most powerful systems are safe before those systems reach the public. The state isn’t waiting for Washington to act. It’s building its own set of […] The post Illinois Governor Signs AI Safety L

entries.title: SBS embeds AI into core banking platform
entries.summary: SBS, the global financial technology company that more than 1,500 financial institutions rely on to digitally transform the way they operate, is launching SBS AI Foundation, embedding enterprise AI directly into the core banking, lending, and digital banking products its clients already run.

entries.title: Visa: AI and Digital Commerce Power Global Economy Growth Amid Rising Costs
entries.summary: SAN FRANCISCO--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- The global economy is expected to grow 2.4% in 2026, according to Visa Business and Economic Insights’ (VBEI) 2026 Midyear Global Economic Outlook. While higher energy prices are squeezing household budgets and creating fresh challenges, a surge in business investment—particularly in artificial intelligence, clean energy, and strategic industries—is helping offset

entries.title: JPMorgan Chase picks SambaNova for on-prem AI inference
entries.summary: JPMorgan Chase has picked artificial intelligence chip startup SambaNova as an infrastructure partner, deploying its systems to power on-premises AI inference.

entries.title: Alight and BNY launch integrated retirement plan
entries.summary: Alight (NYSE: ALIT), a leading benefits administration provider of health, wealth and leave solutions, today announced a collaboration with BNY (NYSE: BNY), a global financial services platforms company, to launch a retirement solution designed to offer defined contribution (DC) and defined benefit (DB) plan sponsors and participants deeper support for plan administration and investing.

entries.summary: PNC today announced the launch of its new Mobile Banking app, a modernized platform that delivers a personalized, secure and high-performing digital experience to help retail clients seamlessly manage their financial lives.

entries.title: NextGen FinCrime 2026: How non-financial sectors can replicate banks’ success in fraud prevention
entries.summary: At the inaugural NextGen FinCrime event in 2026, Emma Lindley MBE kicked off sessions with a keynote on the evolving landscape of financial crime, emphasising the shift from traditional bank-based fraud to more sophisticated online attacks.

entries.title: Dun & Bradstreet brings agentic credit and portfolio management workflows to Databricks
entries.summary: Dun & Bradstreet announced it is delivering agentic credit and portfolio management workflows, leveraging the D&B Commercial Graph™, available through the Databricks Marketplace and Databricks OpenSharing.

entries.title: Owning the Exchange Is Becoming the New Competitive Advantage in Prediction Markets
entries.summary: Owning exchange infrastructure is becoming a common strategy across prediction markets.
